description: A manifest for a bundle of ready-to-used workflows

name.description: A short name for what this workflow bundle holds

description.description: A description on what type of workflows this bunde holds

categories.description: A list of categories that are included in this workflow bundle

name.description: The name of the category (can be used for filtering)

path.description: The RELATIVE path to the category folder. Is used to access that category's manifest.json

bundles.description: A list of ABSOLUTE paths to external bundle manifests.

path.description: The absolute path to an external bundle manifest

tags.description: An array of tags that can be automatically appended to ALL entries loaded from the external bundle.

certified.description: Whether all of the flows in the bundle should automatically be marked as 'certified' (unless they are explicitly marked as non-certified).

tagDefinitions.description: A list of defined tags. Each tag defines its' possible values. These can be used to construct custom filtering.

id.description: The id of the tag. Goes in the left-hand side of the following format <TAG_ID>:<TAG_VALUE>

name.description: A user-friendly name of the tag. Displayed on built filter options

description.description: A short description of the tag GROUP.

values.description: Possible values for the tag. Each can go in the right-hand side of the following format <TAG_ID>:<TAG_VALUE>

items.description: A possible value for a tag group.

id.description: The id of the tag VALUE. Is in the format XYZ:ABC where XYZ is the ID of the parent tag group.

name.description: A user-friendly name of the tag value. Displayed on built filter options

description.description: A short description of the tag value.
